events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`, treating the observed undersizing and voltage-drop issue as a compliance failure because it is still in progress and can be corrected before acceptance.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer_candidate.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"in-progress\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 50,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Installed or selected conductors are undersized for the calculated load and circuit length.\",
    \"Voltage drop has not been adequately accounted for in conductor sizing.\",
    \"Current conductor selection does not demonstrate compliance with NEC ampacity requirements or project engineered documents.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop pulling or terminating the affected conductors until sizing is corrected.\",
    \"Recalculate conductor ampacity using NEC 310 and Table 310.16 with all applicable derating, temperature, terminal, and load factors.\",
    \"Check voltage drop for the actual one-way circuit length and load, then upsize conductors or revise the engineered design as required.\",
    \"Remove and replace any undersized conductors already installed, or obtain an approved engineered revision before continuing.\",
    \"Document the corrective sizing and submit for inspection or quality verification before energization.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"Undersizing conductors for load and run length is not an acceptable field shortcut. Even if the base ampacity table appears close, the installed circuit must meet ampacity, derating, terminal temperature, and practical voltage-drop requirements for the engineered load. Because the work is still in progress, the compliant course is to stop affected work, recalculate, and replace or revise before acceptance or energization.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 310\",
    \"NEC Table 310.16\",
    \"NEC 110.3(B)\",
    \"NEC 210.19 Informational Note No. 4\",
    \"NEC 215.2 Informational Note No. 2\"
  ]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer_candidate.json /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/tmp/answer_validated.json && mv /tmp/answer_validated.json /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
→ {
    "decision": "fail",
    "risk": "high",
    "work_stage": "in-progress",
    "component_conditions": [
        "installed-defective",
        "non-compliant"
    ],
    "percent_complete": 50,
    "value": 0,
    "sound_source": "",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "event_time": 0.0,
    "rate":…
